notes: Between the Fall 2025 and Fall 2027 application cycles, the School of Social Sciences, Humanities and Arts will not require transfer students to complete major specific selection criteria to be admitted to this major*. Students wanting to enroll in this major will be admitted using UC Merced's general transfer requirements**. * This only applies to certain SSHA majors. ** The General Transfer Requirements are as f ol lows: Units and GPA Complete 60 semester (90 quarter) units of UC-transferable college credit Earn a minimum grade point average of 2.40 (nonresident: 2.80) in UC-transferable courses Take no more than 14 semester (21 quarter) units as Pass/Not Pass Course Requirements/Subject Requirements Complete the following seven-course pattern, earning a grade of C- or better in each course: Two transferable English composition courses One transferable mathematical concepts and quantitative reasoning course that has a published prerequisite of intermediate algebra Four transferable courses chosen from at least two of the following areas: Arts and Humanities, Behavioral and Social Sciences, Biological and Physical Sciences While major courses are not required for admissions, it is highly recommended to complete as many of the recommended major preparatory courses as possible before transferring to ensure timely progress to degree. Any major courses not completed prior to enrollment at UC Merced must be completed upon enrollment at UC Merced to ensure time to degree and graduation. Recommended, but not Required Prior to Transfer: Complete the following Common Foundations Courses: GASP 001 and GASP 002 Complete one course from the following course ranges: GASP 007 or GASP 050-089 Complete the following Additional Foundations Courses: GASP 006 and ANTH 001 Music or Dance Requirement/Ensemble: Complete eight units chosen from the following ranges: GASP 030-049 (GASP 130 -149 upper division courses can also count) Visual Arts Studio: Complete four units chosen from the following course ranges: GASP 030 - 049 (GASP 130 -149 upper division courses can also count) Courses in the major must be taken for a letter grade, and specifically may not be taken on a pass/no pass basis unless the course is only offered on a pass/no pass basis. AP Exam Score & Course Exemptions AP Studio Art: Drawing: score of 4 or 5 exempts one (1) course in GASP to count towards one Visual Arts Course for the GASP Major. AP Studio Art: 2-D Design: score of 4 or 5 exempts one (1) course in GASP to count towards one Visual Arts Course for the GASP Major. AP Studio Art: 3-D Design: score of 4 or 5 exempts one (1) course in GASP to count towards one Visual Arts Course for the GASP Major. AP Art History: score of 4 or 5 exempts one (1) course in GASP to count toward one lower division course within the GASP Major. UC Merced Advance Placement (AP) and International Baccalaureate (IB) credit policies are detailed in the link below: A dvance Placement (AP) and International Baccalaureate (IB) Examinations Please read the catalog page for more information about the Global Arts Studies, Performance Studies Emphasis major. For more questions about admissions, please email: transfer@ucmerced.edu .
